subject: CHINESE FOR X-Mas
body:
What does every non-observer do this week.   It's  boring. 
Shoooo , the world ceases  around this  holiday.   Where will you be ? ?
 Get my message lastnight ?    (my hubby came  home - yeahhhh )    Of course 
on his way to the office now tho I  picked him up after 1 AM  (sweet, i know , 
but dumb - even people are nutsy  more- so .  )                  Marcia M.
p.s.    speak to  us .  I know there is a ton of stuff going on re: you now.  
 Sorry.

body_html:
What does every non-observer do this week.   It's boring. 
Shoooo , the world ceases  around this holiday.   Where will you be ? ?
 Get my message lastnight ?    (my hubby came home - yeahhhh )    Of course on his way to the office now tho I picked him up after 1 AM  (sweet, i know , but dumb - even people are nutsy more- so . )                  Marcia M.
p.s.    speak to us .  I know there is a ton of stuff going on re: you now.  Sorry.
